markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Marcell Ozuna records 2+ home runs in Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 8, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Marcell Ozuna is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Marcell Ozuna starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Marcell Ozuna is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Marcell Ozuna is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
markets.title: Marcell Ozuna: 2+ home runs?
